While things start lowest with the 720p 32-inch Select Series HD Smart TV at $99 shipped, I personally would spend the minuscule extra amount to instead go with the 32-inch Select Series 1080p Full HD Smart TV at $109.99 shipped that has fallen from $130 here, unless you’d prefer a much more advanced and larger model, like the 72-inch Plus Series 4K QLED Smart TV or any of the models in-between them. Not only is the 1080p 32-inch model starting with an already budget-friendly full price, but the $20 cut from the tag puts it back at its all-time low. Be sure to head below and browse the full lineup of deals while they last, which make excellent opportunities to upgrade your media rooms, kids’ rooms, or elsewhere in your home and beyond.

One offer that you can find within both sales is the Hiboy EX6 e-bike down at $899.99 shipped. It may carry a $1,580 MSRP direct from the brand, but recently hasn’t been seen climbing above $1,100. While we have seen it go a bit lower in 2025, you’re looking at a $200 markdown off the going rate here that gives you the best price we have tracked in 2026. You can find all the Amazon-specific deals rounded up below, as well as the direct Spring Sale offers on the main landing page here.

more…

items.title: tomtoc backpacks, slings, more fall as low as $20 for Amazon’s Big Spring Sale (Up to 40% off)
items.summary:
We’re in day 3 of Amazon’s Big Spring Sale and it’s time to shine a spotlight on tomtoc’s markdowns at up to 40% off. One of my favorites is the tomtoc 10L EDC Sling Bag at $56.79 shipped. These days it spends most of its time up at $71, but when it drops, it tends to drop this low. It has fallen as low as $52 in the past, but we’re talking $5 for a price difference we haven’t spotted since late 2023. This sleek and spacious offering boasts enough room for a 14-inch MacBook Pro plus a bunch of other gear. If you have a different style in mind, browse the list down below to see all of your options starting from $20.

items.title: No outlet, no problem – WYZE Bulb Cam can help at $40, more security gear from $30 (Up to 36% off)
items.summary:
Amazon’s Big Spring Sale is kicking right now and WYZE is offering up to 36% off it’s already-affordable home security lineup. My top pick is the standout WYZE Bulb Security Camera down at $39.98 shipped. This unit tends to sell for $50, but right now you can cash in for $10 less. Not much needs to be said here about what makes this security camera different. Instead of a wall outlet, it can derive it’s power from a light fixture. This paves the way for hassle-free installation and best of all, it still has a built-in light too. You can find a lot of other WYZE discounts down below that are priced from $30.

more…

items.title: Fanttik’s pivoting S1 APEX Electric Screwdriver falls to $77, more tools from $30 (Up to 56% off)
items.summary:
Fanttik’s official storefront is getting in on the Amazon Big Spring Deals action with up to 56% off its tool lineup. To my eye, one of the standouts here is the Fanttik S1 APEX Electric Screwdriver for $76.99 shipped. This unit generally sells for $110 and the price you’re looking at today marks a return to the lowest Amazon offer we’ve tracked. It hasn’t been this low since early December either. One glance probably tells you what I like here, and it’s the pivoting design. This allows it to fit all sorts of places a bulkier screwdriver cannot. Other perks include a handy carrying case, a digital display, carrying case, and USB-C charging. Head below to find a whole lot more Fanttik tools on sale from $30.

more…

items.title: HOTO’s USB-C rechargeable hot glue gun hits $24, laser measure $30, more (Up to 50% off)
items.summary:
As a part of Amazon’s Big Spring Sale, the official HOTO storefront is getting in on the action with tools priced as low as $10. One standout is the HOTO Cordless USB-C Rechargeable Hot Glue Gun down at $23.97 Prime shipped. If you don’t have Prime, check out with at least $35 in your cart to score free shipping. Over the last few months, this unit has sold for as much as $40, but more often than not it’s between $30 and $36. That said, you’re looking at up to 40% off and a price that comes within a couple of bucks of the best Amazon price we’ve tracked in over a year. This hot glue gun sidesteps the need for an outlet with a rechargeable design that tops off over USB-C. This makes it a nice replacement for standard solutions if you ask me. Head below to find a whole lot more HOTO gear that’s up to 50% off.

more…

We’re right in the middle of Amazon’s Big Spring Sale and it’s time to highlight HUANUO’s lineup of desks, office chairs, monitor mounts, and more. Pricing kicks off from $24 and markdowns go as high as 54% off. I spend a lot of time at my desk, and so I’m a big fan of ergonomic chairs, which is why I’m leading with the HUANUO Ergonomic Office Chair at $95.97 shipped. This unit sells for $160 more often than not during the 5 months it has been listed at Amazon. Today’s offer is a match for the lowest Amazon offer we’ve tracked, so it’s a great time to cash in and upgrade an aging chair. This model features a clean design and I dig that the armrests can be folded up and out of the way. Head below to find a whole lot more HUANUO deals from $24.
